headline: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
summary: Abel, a longtime Iowa resident who was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962, was among the roughly two dozen people from 16 countries who participated in an annual naturalization ceremony hosted by the Iowa Cubs Thursday night in Des Moines.

headline: City of London Braces for Burnham Government’s Chancellor Pick
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Mansion House dinner each summer is normally a chance for the City of London to hear what’s on the Chancellor of the Exchequer’s mind. Except this year, nobody’s sure who the chancellor will be.
